abilities.name: effect-spore
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed, poisoned, or put to sleep, chosen at random. Nothing is done to compensate if the move's user is immune to one of these ailments; there is simply a lower chance that the move's user will be affected.
abilities.flavorText: Contact with the Pokémon may inflict poison, sleep, or paralysis on the attacker.

abilities.name: dry-skin
abilities.shortEffect: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain. Increases damage from Fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn during strong sunlight, but it heals for 1/8 of its HP each turn during rain. This Pokémon takes 1.25× as much damage from Fire-type moves, but whenever a Water move hits it, it heals for 1/4 its maximum HP instead.
abilities.flavorText: Restores the Pokémon's HP in rain or when it is hit by Water-type moves. Reduces HP in harsh sunlight, and increases the damage received from Fire-type moves.

abilities.name: damp
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.effect: While this Pokémon is in battle, Self-Destruct and Explosion will fail and Aftermath will not take effect.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.
